name: ExtensionAppointment_Participant_Required
title: R5: The participant is required to attend (optional when false) additional types
description: R5: `Appointment.participant.required` additional types (boolean) additional types from child elements (value)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Appointment.participant.required` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Appointment.participant.required` 0..1 `boolean`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Appointment.participant.required` 0..1 `boolean`
*  R4B: `Appointment.participant.required` 0..1 `code`
*  R4: `Appointment.participant.required` 0..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Appointment.participant.required` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Appointment.participant.required` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `Appointment.participant.required` do not cover the following types: boolean.
The mappings for `Appointment.participant.required` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: value.

element.short: R5: The participant is required to attend (optional when false) additional types
element.definition: R5: `Appointment.participant.required` additional types (boolean) additional types from child elements (value)
element.comment:
Element `Appointment.participant.required` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Appointment.participant.required` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `Appointment.participant.required` do not cover the following types: boolean.
The mappings for `Appointment.participant.required` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: value.
For the use-case where two doctors need to meet to discuss the results for a specific patient, and the patient is not required to be present include the patient in the subject field, but do not include them as a participant - this was formerly done prior to R5 with required='information-only'.

element.short: The participant is required to attend (optional when false)
element.definition: Whether this participant is required to be present at the meeting. If false, the participant is optional.
element.comment: For the use-case where two doctors need to meet to discuss the results for a specific patient, and the patient is not required to be present include the patient in the subject field, but do not include them as a participant - this was formerly done prior to R5 with required='information-only'.
